zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine於1410年3月7日出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine31歲，母親Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay21歲。他於1430年與Janet Elisabeth Douglas在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年4月在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金享年83歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine于1410年3月7日出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，他的父亲Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine31岁，母亲Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay21岁。他于1430年与Janet Elisabeth Douglas在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年4月在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金享年83岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine was born on 7 March 1410, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, was 31 and his mother, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, was 21. He married Janet Elisabeth Douglas in 1430, in Selkirkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died in April 1493, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 83, and was buried in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine est né le 7 mars 1410, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Janet Elisabeth Douglas en 1430, à Selkirkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1493, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine am 7. März 1410 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine 31 und seine Mutter Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay 21. Er hat 1430 in Selkirkshire, Scotland Janet Elisabeth Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb im April 1493 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine è nato il il 7 marzo 1410 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Janet Elisabeth Douglas nel 1430, nel Selkirkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1493, nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskineが1410年3月7日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskineは31歳，母Marjory Elizabeth Lindsayは21歳であった。1430年にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアでJanet Elisabeth Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年4月にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで83歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine(이)가 1410년 3월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1430년 스컷랜드 셀커크실르에서 Janet Elisabeth Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 4월 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine nasceu em 7 de março de 1410, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Elisabeth Douglas em 1430, em Selkirkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1493, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine родился 7 марта 1410 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Elisabeth Douglas в 1430 г. в местности селкиркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер апрель 1493 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine nació el 7 de marzo de 1410, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Janet Elisabeth Douglas en 1430, en Selkirkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en abril de 1493, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
